channel.title: Posts on Pieroci in DevOps
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Pieroci in DevOps

item.title: Releasing OpenAPI Specs at Compile Time with .NET 9
item.description: Explore different OpenAPI generation strategies and learn how to use the new .NET 9 compile-time documentation feature.

item.title: The Irresistible Urge to Add a "v" to Semantic Versions – And Why to Avoid It
item.description: In past releases from well-known and widely-used companies, problems (on a global scale) have occurred due to the use of “v” in semantic versions.

item.title: Automating Managed Identity Integration for SQL Server with Terraform and Azure DevOps
item.description: Implementing an Azure Sql Server comunication with managed identity and IaC

item.title: From Peano to Pipelines: Why Mathematical Induction Belongs in DevOps
item.description: A technical reflection on how mathematical induction, starting from Peano’s view of the natural numbers, offers a surprisingly elegant way to reason about CI/CD pipelines, artifact promotion, and DevOps invariants.
